subject: A spectral bear-spirit, translucent and glowing green, rears up mid-roar in a dim forest
description: A ghostly bear made of pale green spirit-energy rears on its hind legs in a shadowed forest. The creature is semi-transparent and luminous, its outline crackling with wispy ectoplasmic tendrils that trail off into the air. Its mouth gapes open in a roar, teeth and claws visible through the glow. The bear is rendered almost entirely in vivid lime and emerald green tones, contrasting against a murky, near-black background of indistinct tree trunks and forest gloom. The light source is the bear itself — it casts a soft green glow into the dark woods around it.
foreground: rearing translucent green spirit-bear, roaring with claws raised
background: dark indistinct forest, shadowed tree trunks, deep gloom
